youtube_chapters_notes: 4 chapters, 59.45s total, validated PASS — AKB-10 r8
notes: Round 8 — AKB-10. Voice: Liam (VCgLBmBjldJmfphyB8sZ) ONLY. Three fixes from r6/r7: (1) settings steps target .right-panel-container so tooltip auto-positions LEFT of panel (spotlight is ON the panel); (2) no preview scene — 10 steps only; (3) language set to English via mainInteractions on qa-type-heading step. Raw was 97.24s, trimmed to 40.76s (boot-cut 3.5s), padded to 54.76s (tpad stop_mode=clone +14s), narrated (mixed), then branded outro appended = 59.45s final. VO overlap checker: PASS. Audio energy scan: no truncation. Captions uploaded (status=serving). Video: out-qa-r8/using-qa-r8-with-outro.webm

steps.display_text: A Q&A slide lets your audience send questions from their phones while you present. We'll build one and cover all the settings.
steps.tts_text: A Q&A slide lets your audience send questions from their phones while you present. We'll build one and cover all the settings.

steps.display_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.
steps.tts_text: Click New Presentation to open a fresh deck.

steps.display_text: Select Q&A from the slide type picker — it gathers audience questions in real time.
steps.tts_text: Select Q&A from the slide type picker — it gathers audience questions in real time.

steps.display_text: Type a welcoming heading so participants know what this slide is for.
steps.tts_text: Type a welcoming heading so participants know what this slide is for.

steps.display_text: Choose whether questions come in only on this Q&A slide, or on every slide in your presentation.
steps.tts_text: Choose whether questions come in only on this Q&A slide, or on every slide in your presentation.

steps.display_text: Tick Filter profanity to block swear words — ideal for school or public events.
steps.tts_text: Tick Filter profanity to block swear words — ideal for school or public events.

steps.display_text: Enable moderation to approve questions privately before they show on screen. A link lets you or a co-host filter from a separate tab.
steps.tts_text: Enable moderation to approve questions privately before they show on screen. A link lets you or a co-host filter from a separate tab.

steps.display_text: When on, audience members can see each other's submitted questions — great for upvoting.
steps.tts_text: When on, audience members can see each other's submitted questions — great for upvoting.

steps.display_text: Allow anonymous lets participants skip entering their name — encourages candid questions.
steps.tts_text: Allow anonymous lets participants skip entering their name — encourages candid questions.

steps.display_text: That's everything. Hit Present and your audience starts sending questions live — you organise and answer from one screen.
steps.tts_text: That's everything. Hit Present and your audience starts sending questions live — you organise and answer from one screen.
